label: Träförädling och tillverkning av trävaror
description: Scaffold för företag inom SNI 16 som tillverkar och bearbetar trä, kork, halm, rotting eller liknande material. Strukturen lyfter produkter, material, tillverkningskapacitet, referensprojekt och tydlig kontakt för offertförfrågningar.
primaryJobs: bygga förtroende med material- och processinformation

routes.purpose: Positionera verksamheten, visa vad som tillverkas och leda besökaren till kontakt eller offertförfrågan.
Visa produktkategorier, specialtillverkning och exempel på trävaror eller komponenter som företaget levererar.
Förklara tjänster som kapning, bearbetning, ytbehandling, montering eller legotillverkning på ett konkret sätt.
Visa tidigare projekt, leveranser eller kundcase som hjälper besökaren att bedöma kvalitet, utförande och lämplighet.
Bygg förtroende genom att beskriva företagets bakgrund, arbetssätt, materialfokus och team.
Gör det enkelt att skicka förfrågan med kontaktuppgifter, formulär, adress och praktisk information.

routes.when: när företaget behöver förklara träslag, skivmaterial, kork, rotting eller andra materialval mer utförligt
när många frågor återkommer om mått, leveranstider, specialbeställningar eller materialval

sectionOrderRules: Hero must state what the company manufactures and include a primary contact CTA.
Product summary should show concrete product types or manufacturing focus, not vague promises.
Trust proof must rely on real references, lead times, material information or customer reviews when available.
Avoid repeating the same examples in both product summary and gallery without adding new information.
Products intro must explain what kinds of goods, components or custom products are offered.
Product list items must be specific and grouped in a way that fits the business, such as panel, packaging, interior details, components or custom production.
If pricing information is shown, it must be indicative and clearly framed when variation depends on material, dimensions or volume.
Services intro must connect the production capability to customer needs such as custom dimensions, series production or finishing.
Service list should describe actual manufacturing or support services, not generic business statements.
Process summary should clarify how an order typically moves from inquiry to delivery.
References intro must explain what the examples represent, such as completed jobs, product examples or delivered series.
Reference gallery should use real project or product examples and may include short context like material, use case or scope.
Do not present speculative outcomes or unsupported claims about customer results.
About story must be specific about the companys background, production focus or way of working.
Team should only be shown when actual people or roles are available.
Trust proof may include sourcing information, years of experience, production know-how or references, but must stay factual.
Contact info must include the real contact channels that are available and should not use placeholder content.
Contact CTA should support quote requests, drawings, measurements or other useful inquiry details when relevant.
Map and opening hours are optional and should only appear when the business has public-facing visit information.

mustPass: Routes reflect industry needs by covering products, manufacturing services and references.
Every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry.
All route ids, section ids and paths use kebab-case conventions where applicable.
Purposes and rules stay honest and avoid invented certifications or unsupported claims.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not model the business like a generic local service company only.
Do not omit products or references, since buyers often need to evaluate manufacturing fit and finish.
Do not rely on generic quality claims without showing materials, process, references or reviews.
Do not add ecommerce checkout assumptions unless the dossier clearly supports it.

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Tillverkning av trävaror, träförädling, snickerikomponenter, trädetaljer, kork, rotting, halmprodukter, specialtillverkning, legotillverkning, bearbetning, referensprojekt, materialfokus, offertförfrågan.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold for companies that make, process or supply wood-based goods rather than primarily installing them on site.
Prefer this scaffold when products, materials, dimensions, finishing or manufacturing capacity are central to the offer.
References should emphasize delivered products or projects rather than only team presentation.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
